pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent to 2.6.2 to support Java 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.4.x does not support Java 17; compilation or runtime failures occur due to unsupported bytecode version or removed APIs.

pom.xml.general_idea: Configure the project to compile and run with Java 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the compiler targets Java 11, which is incompatible with the target JDK 17 environment or intended bytecode version.

pom.xml.general_idea: Configure Maven compiler plugin with Java 17 source/target and annotation processors for Lombok and MapStruct.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without explicit source/target 17 and annotation processor configuration, the project may fail to compile due to missing generated code from Lombok/MapStruct or incorrect bytecode version.

pom.xml.general_idea: Re-add Spring Boot Maven plugin which was inadvertently removed during refactoring.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without the Spring Boot Maven plugin, the application cannot be packaged as an executable JAR or run via 'mvn spring-boot:run'.
